sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94434" key="sitoforiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῑτοφορ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n94434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corn-bearing</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,PSI:2:240:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.240.8</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(ii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
